title: MCP Research Lane — context7+exa MCP for read-only children; Main-direct codex_search
approach: Extend the read-only research tools allowlist from [read,grep,find,ls] to [read,grep,find,ls,resolve-library-id,query-docs,web_search_exa,web_fetch_exa] across the four supervisor handshake research dispatches (create 10B, plan 8B, research 5, ship 6A), the supervise.md mini-research dispatch, and the gather-phase guidance (create Phase 4, plan Phase 3, research). Children stay extensions:false, recursive:false, worktree:false — no capability widening (no bash, no fabric_exec, no recursion); they just gain web/doc MCP lookup. codex_search (pi-codex-search 0.1.5, a Pi extension blocked by --no-extensions/resource-loader.js:267,351) stays Main-direct: Main runs codex_search itself (extensions loaded, fullCodeMode:true) for premium ChatGPT-subscription web search with citations; NOT delegated to extensions:false children. Parallel fan-out for gather phases (create Deep=3-5 agents, research Multi-Angle=parallel scouts already partly parallel) — MCP makes each parallel child richer; the supervisor handshake stays ONE gather (single direction question) but MCP-equipped. ADR-013 records: MCP-equipped parallel read-only research lane preserving extensions:false; codex_search Main-direct; no capability widening. Ships after proactive-supervisor (ADR-012) settled at HEAD a04a65c; ADR-013 is next available. Rejected Option B (extensions:true children + tight allowlist excluding fabric_exec) because safety hinges on an unproven allowlist-vs-fabric_exec filter on the agents.run child path (high blast radius if wrong).
blocks: proactive-supervisor (ADR-012) must settle for shared files (supervise.md, create/plan/research/ship, AGENTS, DECISIONS, PLAN, tech-stack, roadmap, state) — SETTLED at HEAD a04a65c; ADR-012 present at DECISIONS.md:370
No capability widening: children stay extensions:false (codex_search is Main-direct only)
No change to the supervisor actor config (extensions:false read-only posture preserved)
MCP tool names are stable upstream: context7 resolve-library-id/query-docs (3.2.3), exa web_search_exa/web_fetch_exa (3.2.1)

success_criteria.criterion: A1: supervise.md handshake mini-research allowlist extended with 4 MCP names; Main-direct codex_search documented; hard limits + extensions:false actor config + ADR-012 protocol preserved
success_criteria.verify: rg -n 'resolve-library-id|query-docs|web_search_exa|web_fetch_exa' .pi/prompts/supervise.md && rg -n 'codex_search' .pi/prompts/supervise.md && rg -n 'proactive-supervisor/v1' .pi/prompts/supervise.md && ! rg -n 'tools:\["read","grep","find","ls"\]' .pi/prompts/supervise.md && git diff --check

success_criteria.criterion: A2: create.md (Phase 4 gather + Phase 10B handshake) + plan.md (Phase 3 gather + Phase 8B handshake) allowlists extended with MCP names; Main-direct codex_search noted; ADR-012 + ADR-011 markers + <slug> + frontmatter preserved
success_criteria.verify: rg -n 'resolve-library-id|web_search_exa' .pi/prompts/create.md .pi/prompts/plan.md && rg -n 'codex_search' .pi/prompts/create.md .pi/prompts/plan.md && rg -n '^## Phase 10A: Spec Review Gate$|^## Phase 10B: Supervisor Boundary Handshake$|^## Phase 8A: Planning Review Gate$|^## Phase 8B: Supervisor Boundary Handshake$' .pi/prompts/create.md .pi/prompts/plan.md && rg -q '<slug>' .pi/prompts/create.md && rg -q '<slug>' .pi/prompts/plan.md && git diff --check

success_criteria.criterion: B1: research.md (gather + Phase 5 handshake) + ship.md (Phase 6A handshake) allowlists extended with MCP names; Main-direct codex_search noted; ADR-012 protocol + ship 'cannot declare verified' + ADR-011 markers preserved
success_criteria.verify: rg -n 'resolve-library-id|web_search_exa' .pi/prompts/research.md .pi/prompts/ship.md && rg -n 'codex_search' .pi/prompts/research.md .pi/prompts/ship.md && rg -n '^### Phase 5: Supervisor Boundary Handshake$|^## Phase 6A: Supervisor Boundary Handshake$' .pi/prompts/research.md .pi/prompts/ship.md && rg -q 'cannot declare' .pi/prompts/ship.md && rg -n '^### Tier-Gated Diff Review$' .pi/prompts/ship.md && git diff --check

success_criteria.criterion: C1: ADR-013 present; PLAN.md has MCP research-lane contract; AGENTS.md has research paragraph with MCP tools + Main-direct codex_search + extensions:false preserved
success_criteria.verify: rg -n '^## ADR-013: MCP research lane$' .pi/artifacts/pi-template/DECISIONS.md && rg -n 'resolve-library-id|web_search_exa|codex_search|MCP research' .pi/artifacts/pi-template/PLAN.md AGENTS.md && rg -n 'extensions: false|extensions:false' AGENTS.md && git diff --check

success_criteria.criterion: C2: tech-stack/roadmap/state synchronized to ADR-013 + MCP research lane + Main-direct codex_search

C3: static closure — pi-fabric 0.23.0, list-models resolve, slug in 5 prompts, forbidden-token clean, git diff --check, protected files unchanged from a04a65c, ADR-011+012 markers preserved, no extensions:true introduced
success_criteria.verify: git diff --check && node -p 'require("./.pi/npm/node_modules/pi-fabric/package.json").version' | rg -x '0\.23\.0' && pi --approve --list-models >/dev/null 2>&1; for f in create plan ship verify research; do rg -q '<slug>' ".pi/prompts/$f.md" || exit 1; done && ! rg -n 'agent:|task\(|question\(|skill\(|write\(|\.active|spec\.md|prd\.json|review-state\.json' .pi/prompts/*.md && ! rg -n 'extensions:true' .pi/prompts/supervise.md .pi/prompts/create.md .pi/prompts/plan.md .pi/prompts/research.md .pi/prompts/ship.md && git diff --exit-code a04a65c5db5b3946c1649fc8bec15fe5140f7ccf -- .pi/fabric.json .pi/settings.json .pi/prompts/verify.md .opencode/command

tasks.verify: rg -n 'resolve-library-id|web_search_exa' .pi/prompts/research.md .pi/prompts/ship.md && rg -n 'codex_search' .pi/prompts/research.md .pi/prompts/ship.md && rg -n '^### Phase 5: Supervisor Boundary Handshake$|^## Phase 6A: Supervisor Boundary Handshake$' .pi/prompts/research.md .pi/prompts/ship.md && rg -q 'cannot declare' .pi/prompts/ship.md && rg -n '^### Tier-Gated Diff Review$' .pi/prompts/ship.md && git diff --check

PLAN.md has the MCP research-lane contract (allowlist, codex_search Main-direct, fan-out).
